query:
SELECT id, runType, status, startedAt, completedAt, durationMs,
       articlesIngested, projectsCreated, contactsEnriched,
       lastActivityNote, triggeredBy,
       LEFT(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(errors, '$[0]')), 200) AS firstError
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 12;
command:
